flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Pima Medical Institute-Albuquerque fell 28% between 2021 and 2024 (782 → 562).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at Pima Medical Institute-Albuquerque vs the 2004–2008 baseline (59.2% vs 66.4%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Pima Medical Institute-Albuquerque rose 566% between 2021 and 2024 (11.7% → 77.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Pima Medical Institute-Albuquerque fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9% → 0.0%).
